title: Design System: atoomic.org — Nicolas R. portfolio

headline.purpose: Section titles, orange with a leading icon.

body.purpose: About, writing, contact prose. 18px / 1.8; base 16px / 1.7. Cap 65–75ch.

shadows.name: shadow-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting state: sticky header, secondary button.

shadows.name: shadow-lg
shadows.purpose: Hover lift on cards and buttons.

shadows.name: orange-glow
shadows.purpose: Profile photo halo and colored hover glow.

shadows.name: stage-shadow
shadows.purpose: Resting depth of AI cards against the Ember backdrop.

motion.name: ease-stage
motion.purpose: AI card hover — confident, slightly decelerated lift.

motion.name: type-hero
motion.purpose: Self-typing hero role; cursor blinks at 0.7s step-end.

motion.name: shimmer
motion.purpose: AI card top shimmer bar on hover.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: prefers-reduced-motion: near-instant fallback for every animation.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Container padding widens; section padding eases to 60px.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Stack to single column; hero CTA goes full-width vertical.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Nav wraps; timeline item stacks logo above content.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main CTA — Reactor Orange fill, leading icon, lifts with an orange glow on hover.
components.html: Download Resume
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); color: #fff; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--orange-dark, #e85a28); transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(1); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Paper fill with a 2px orange border; inverts to orange-on-white on hover.
components.html: Contact
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 14px 28px; border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); border: 2px solid var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; text-decoration: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Skill Tag
components.description: Pill chip — orange wash fill, orange text; inverts to solid orange on hover.
components.css: .ds-skill-tag { display: inline-block; background: rgba(255,107,53,0.1); color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 20px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid transparent; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-skill-tag:hover { background: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); color: #fff; transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.05); box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255,107,53,0.3); }

components.name: Timeline Card
components.description: Paper card on the experience rail; lifts with a soft orange-tinted shadow on hover.
components.html:
WordPress Department Manager

September 2025 – Present

  • Bring together WebPros teams building WP Squared, WordPress Toolkit, and Nova AI.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; padding: 28px; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,107,53,0.02), #fff); } .ds-card-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text-dark, #1a1a1a); } .ds-card-date { color: var(--text-light, #6a6a6a); font-size: 16px; margin: 4px 0 16px; } .ds-card-list { list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; } .ds-card-list li { padding-left: 24px; position: relative; margin-bottom: 12px; color: var(--text-medium, #4a4a4a); line-height: 1.7; } .ds-card-list li::before { content: '→'; position: absolute; left: 0; color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); font-weight: 700; }

components.name: AI Capability Card
components.description: Signature featured card on the Ember stage — ghost step-number, top shimmer bar, heavier resting shadow. NOTE: the source border-left stripe is a known ban; the top shimmer bar is the sanctioned accent.
components.html:
01

Agentic Orchestration

Multi-agent systems that decompose tasks and deliver reliable outcomes at scale.
components.css: .ds-ai-card { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); padding: 36px 32px 32px; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); transition: transform 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94), box-shadow 0.4s ease; } .ds-ai-card::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--orange-primary,#ff6b35), var(--orange-light,#ff8559), var(--orange-primary,#ff6b35)); background-size: 200% 100%; opacity: 0.5; } .ds-ai-card:hover { transform: translateY(-8px) scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.15), 0 8px 24px rgba(255,107,53,0.12); } .ds-ai-card:hover::before { opacity: 1; animation: ds-shimmer 1.5s ease infinite; } @keyframes ds-shimmer { 0% { background-position: -200% 0; } 100% { background-position: 200% 0; } } .ds-ai-step { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 20px; font-size: 48px; font-weight: 800; color: rgba(255,107,53,0.08); letter-spacing: -0.04em; line-height: 1; pointer-events: none; user-select: none; } .ds-ai-icon { width: 64px; height: 64px; border-radius: 16px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,107,53,0.12), rgba(255,107,53,0.06)); border: 1px solid rgba(255,107,53,0.15); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); margin-bottom: 24px; transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.25,0.46,0.45,0.94); } .ds-ai-card:hover .ds-ai-icon { transform: scale(1.1) rotate(-3deg); background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--orange-primary,#ff6b35), var(--orange-light,#ff8559)); color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(255,107,53,0.3); } .ds-ai-card:hover .ds-ai-icon svg { stroke: #fff; } .ds-ai-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.01em; color: var(--text-dark, #1a1a1a); margin: 0 0 12px; } .ds-ai-body { font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.7; color: var(--text-medium, #4a4a4a); margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact form field — 2px Paper Line border that shifts to orange with a soft ring on focus.
components.html: <label class="ds-input-label" for="ds-name">Name</label><input class="ds-input" id="ds-name" type="text" placeholder="Your name" />
components.css: .ds-input-label { display: block; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-dark, #1a1a1a); margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-input { width: 100%; padding: 12px 16px; border: 2px solid var(--bg-grey, #e9ecef); border-radius: 8px; background: #fff; color: var(--text-dark, #1a1a1a); font-size: 16px; font-family: inherit; transition: all 0.3s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-light, #6a6a6a); opacity: 0.6; } .ds-input:hover { border-color: rgba(255,107,53,0.3); } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(255,107,53,0.12); transform: translateY(-1px); }

components.name: Sticky Navigation
components.description: Glassy Paper header, 98% opacity + blur; gold ☢ + orange wordmark; links underline-from-left in orange.
components.html:
☢atoomic
  • About
  • Experience
  • Contact
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 32px; padding: 20px 24px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.98); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); } .ds-nav-logo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-symbol { color: #d4a017; font-size: 36px; line-height: 1; } .ds-nav-word { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); letter-spacing: -0.03em; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; list-style: none; gap: 32px; margin: 0; padding: 0; } .ds-nav-links a { position: relative; color: var(--text-medium, #4a4a4a); text-decoration: none; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-links a::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -4px; left: 0; width: 0; height: 2px; background: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); transition: width 0.3s ease; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); } .ds-nav-links a:hover::after { width: 100%; } .ds-nav-links a:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--orange-primary, #ff6b35); outline-offset: 4px; border-radius: 4px; }

narrative.overview: This portfolio is a lit stage where a career runs as current. Reactor Orange (#ff6b35) is the live wire — not an accent sprinkled on white, but the charge that powers the page. Where the orange earns surface, it takes it; neutrals are the stage, not the act. Density is comfortable, not crowded. Light surfaces alternate Paper and Paper Mist until the AI Capabilities section drops to Ember (#1f1714), a warm near-black — the stage going dark for the headline act. Type is one confident system-sans family worked across a wide weight range and a fluid clamp() scale. Every surface is tactile and confident: buttons press, cards lift on a colored glow, the hero types itself in. The system rejects the Generic SaaS/AI template, the stock green-on-black developer portfolio, corporate beige/gray, and empty minimalism.
keyCharacteristics: One live-wire accent — Reactor Orange — carries CTAs, links, headings, focus rings, and the hero role.
Single-family system-sans typography, hierarchy via weight and fluid clamp() scale.
Hybrid elevation: soft floating shadows on light surfaces; one dark tonal contrast (Ember) for the AI section.
Tactile, confident motion — hover lifts, colored orange glows, a self-typing hero.
Color-drenched permission: the orange may own 30–60% of hero/feature surfaces; never a 1px stripe.

rules.name: The Live-Wire Rule
rules.body: Reactor Orange is the only saturated hue. It carries every CTA, link, heading accent, focus ring, and the timeline rail. Neutrals never compete; when the orange appears, it is the signal.

rules.name: The Drench Permission
rules.body: On hero and feature surfaces the orange may own 30–60% of the visible area. It is never reduced to a 1px stripe or a faint tint where a real surface is warranted.

rules.name: The Single-Family Rule
rules.body: One system-sans family across every role. Hierarchy is weight + scale, never a second typeface.

rules.name: The Fluid-Scale Rule
rules.body: Every heading uses clamp() so type breathes across viewports without breakpoint jumps. Display ceiling ≤ 6rem; letter-spacing floor ≥ −0.04em.

rules.name: The Responsive-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Light-surface cards sit on Shadow SM/MD at rest and lift to Shadow LG with a colored orange glow on hover. Shadows respond to interaction, not ambient decoration — except AI cards, whose heavier resting shadow marks them as the headline act.

dos: Do let Reactor Orange own real surface area on hero and feature moments (Committed/Drenched strategy) — it is voice, not decoration.
Do keep body text at Graphite Soft (#4a4a4a, ≥ 4.5:1); reserve Graphite Faint for non-essential metadata only.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion with instant/crossfade fallbacks — the typing hero, scroll reveals, and shimmer all already do.
Do use fluid clamp() scales for every heading; lift cards on hover with a colored orange glow.
Do mark focus with a 2–3px Reactor Orange outline at 3–4px offset.
Do consider a distinctive display typeface as the next craft lever — the single-family stack is honest but undersells the 'how was this made?' goal.
donts: Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe. (The current AI card border-left: 4px violates this — rewrite as the top shimmer bar, a tinted background, or a leading number/icon.)
Don't reach for the Generic SaaS/AI template: indigo-to-violet gradient heroes, glassy feature-card grids, 'trusted by' logo strips, or the big-number hero-metric template.
Don't dress the site as a terminal — green-on-black, matrix rain, or code snippets as decoration (Stock 'developer portfolio').
Don't default to beige/gray muted neutrals; they read as forgettable and fight the orange (Corporate beige/gray).
Don't ship empty minimalism — no imagery, no texture, acres of whitespace that read as unfinished (Overly minimal/empty).
Don't introduce a second saturated hue; Reactor Orange is the only one. Gold stays on the ☢ mark alone.
Don't animate layout properties (width/height/top); use transform, opacity, blur, clip-path, and shadow/glow instead.
Don't gate content visibility on a class-triggered transition with no visible default — reveals must enhance an already-visible state.
